strap: Cardiff Capital Region Fintech draws £158m of UKRI lead-led funding across 65 grants, anchored by Cardiff University (30%), with Office For National Statistics and Welsh Government on the industrial side. 1 Companies House-traced spin-out translates to £158m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Extracting without reinvesting" and "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — exit events recur through international acquisition while intermediation bodies absorb the signal rather than redesigning retention mechanisms.
